ActualText.text: This page was typeset from Markdown – and is fully tagged.

Rendered with glu (boxes and glue). The YAML front matter declares format: PDF/UA, lang: en and a title: – that is all it takes. From those three lines glu automatically writes StructTreeRoot, MarkInfo, /DisplayDocTitle, /Lang and the XMP tag pdfuaid:part 1.
Headings build the outline tree (H1, H2).
Paragraphs become P, lists become L / LI.
The figure below is a Figure element with /Alt text.
Code blocks are emitted as Code.
Acrobat, NVDA and PAC all see this as a properly structured document – no artifacts, no untagged content.

---
title: Markdown to PDF/UA with glu
lang: en
format: PDF/UA
---

Alt.text: Photograph of the sea, embedded as a Form XObject
